calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Denise Doucette, CSR #5963. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2006 Continued To Jun-05-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 6/5/2006 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Ron Sinclair, CSR#1170. (212)

Off Calendar Jan-11-2006 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-06-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)
